channel.title: Brazil Elections 2026
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of the 2026 Brazilian presidential elections.

item.title: Governo Trump propõe que Brasil receba estrangeiros capturados nos EUA e exige plano para acabar com PCC e CV
item.description: The Trump administration proposed that Brazil accept foreign nationals detained in the U.S. in its prisons, similar to El Salvador’s model, and demanded a Brazilian plan to combat PCC, CV, Hezbollah, and Chinese criminal groups. The proposal also includes sharing biometric data of refugees and foreigners in Brazil as part of transnational security cooperation, ahead of Lula’s expected visit to the U.S. in April 2026.

item.title: Serviços avançam 0,3% em janeiro e igualam patamar recorde
item.description: Brazil's services volume rose 0.3% in January compared to December, matching the historical record high of the series initiated in 2011, according to IBGE data released on March 13, 2026. The sector remains active at elevated levels, above pre-pandemic benchmarks, with notable contributions from transport and logistics, and continues its year-on-year growth trend. Services constitute the largest share of Brazil's GDP and serve as a key indicator of national economic activity.

item.title: Enviado de Trump pediu reunião no Itamaraty após aval para visitar Bolsonaro
item.description: Darren Beattie, a senior U.S. State Department advisor on Brazil policy, was authorized by Supreme Court Minister Alexandre de Moraes to meet with former President Jair Bolsonaro on March 18, though Bolsonaro’s defense requested rescheduling to March 16 or 17 due to diplomatic commitments. The U.S. Embassy in Brasília sought a meeting at the Itamaraty after the authorization, but the Brazilian Foreign Ministry stated it never received a formal request and warned the visit could constitute interference in Brazil’s internal affairs during an election year.

item.title: Bartomeu niega haber contratado perfiles falsos para criticar a sus rivales del Barça e insiste en que solo quería “monitorizar” las redes sociales
item.description: Former Barcelona president Josep Maria Bartomeu appeared voluntarily in court amid the Barçagate scandal, accused of hiring fake social media profiles to attack political rivals within the club. He denied the allegations, stating the goal was merely to monitor online discourse after Neymar’s departure to PSG and during the peak of the Catalan independence process in 2017. The case involves i3Ventures and the alleged crime of disloyal administration.

item.title: Novas investidas dos EUA contra o Brasil são mais difíceis de serem rebatidas
item.description: The Brazilian government is facing new challenges from the U.S., including a request for a Trump aide to visit imprisoned ex-president Bolsonaro and efforts to label the PCC and Comando Vermelho as terrorist organizations. While Itamaraty has denounced these actions as interference, Lula’s advisors say countering these provocations is now harder, especially given public concern over security and uncertainty about whether Trump fully endorses the moves. The government is choosing to avoid provocations ahead of a planned meeting between Lula and Trump at the White House.

item.title: Após passar mal, Bolsonaro chega de ambulância a hospital em Brasília
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken by ambulance to DF Star Hospital in Brasília after falling ill, with reports of chills and vomiting. His police escort set up a visual blockade during the transfer to prevent him from being seen. Flávio and Carlos Bolsonaro commented on social media, asking for prayers and alleging ongoing persecution.

item.title: Irã não fechará estreito de Ormuz, diz enviado iraniano à ONU
item.description: Iran’s UN ambassador, Amir Saeid Iravani, stated that Iran will not close the Strait of Hormuz, contradicting earlier claims by the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps that the strait was closed to U.S., Israeli, European, and allied vessels. He blamed the regional instability on U.S. destabilizing actions and reaffirmed Iran’s commitment to freedom of navigation under international maritime law. Since the conflict began on February 28, at least 16 vessels have been attacked in the Persian Gulf, Strait of Hormuz, and Gulf of Oman, according to UKMTO.

item.title: JOTA Principal: Governo Lula replica Bolsonaro ao tentar conter inflação em ano eleitoral
item.description: The Lula government adopted temporary measures to mitigate the impact of international oil price fluctuations on diesel prices in Brazil, including eliminating PIS/Cofins taxes and granting a R$0.32 per liter subsidy, with estimated costs of R$30 billion, offset by new export taxes on oil and diesel. The strategy mirrors Bolsonaro’s 2022 approach, though analysts question whether the discounts will effectively reach consumers.

item.title: Rock in Rio anuncia J Balvin, Pedro Sampaio e mais 15 artistas; veja a lista completa
item.description: Rock in Rio 2026 announced 17 new attractions, including J Balvin, Pedro Sampaio, and K-pop group Nexz, with performances scheduled for September 7, 11, and 12. The festival will take place on September 4, 5, 6, 7, 11, 12, and 13 at Cidade do Rock in Rio de Janeiro, with initial tickets already sold out. Previously confirmed artists include Elton John, Foo Fighters, Avenged Sevenfold, Stray Kids, and Maroon 5.

item.title: STF inicia julgamento sobre suspensão de quebra de sigilo de Lulinha
item.description: The STF begins a virtual trial to decide whether to uphold Justice Flávio Dino’s injunction suspending banking and fiscal secrecy breaches approved by the INSS CPMI, including against Fábio Luís Lula da Silva (Lulinha). Dino annulled the CPMI’s bloc vote, stating parliamentarians must individually justify each secrecy breach, like judges. The CPMI condemned the decision as 'republican indignation', defending bloc voting as a longstanding congressional practice.

item.title: Ex-presidente Bolsonaro é levado para hospital após passar mal na prisão
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro, 70, was taken to a hospital after falling ill in prison in Brasília, where he is serving a 27-year sentence for attempting a coup. His son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, reported that he awoke with chills and vomiting, recurring symptoms tied to the 2018 stabbing. Despite incarceration, Bolsonaro remains a central figure in the 2026 elections, having named Flávio as the right-wing candidate to challenge Lula, with whom he is technically tied in a potential runoff per Datafolha.

item.title: Gleisi e Boulos divulgam vídeo que associa Flávio Bolsonaro a organizações criminosas do Rio
item.description: Gleisi Hoffmann and Guilherme Boulos released a video on social media linking Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) to Rio de Janeiro criminal organizations, citing alleged ties to individuals investigated for connections with the Red Command and involvement in schemes like 'rachadinha'. The move follows a Genial/Quaest poll showing a technical tie between Lula and Bolsonaro in a potential runoff, with PT allies blaming the government for Lula’s declining popularity and calling for a return to active governance.

item.title: PF acha mensagem em que Junior Mano diz ter ‘compromisso’ com Camilo Santana no Ceará
item.description: Federal Police found messages in which Deputy Junior Mano (PSB) received a video from Education Minister Camilo Santana showing Lula urging votes for the PT candidate for mayor of Nova Russas, Pedro Ximenes. Santana attempted to reverse Lula’s support for Mano’s political rival, and Mano replied that there would be no change to his 'commitment' to the minister. PF is investigating Mano for leading a corruption scheme involving illegal campaign financing, vote-buying, and misappropriation of public funds in Ceará.

item.title: Restaurantes não fecham por falta de cliente, mas por falta de controle operacional
item.description: Restaurants in Brazil close not due to lack of customers, but due to lack of operational control, according to the CEO of foodtech Altec. Margin deviations, waste, unpredictable purchasing, and service failures erode profitability and reputation, especially in the era of online reviews. Five key management practices separate profitable businesses from those operating at the margin.

item.title: Paraná Pesquisas: Prefeito de Vitória lidera para o governo do Espírito Santo
item.description: Paraná Pesquisas: Prefeito de Vitória lidera para o governo do Espírito Santo

item.title: Ex-presidente Bolsonaro é levado para hospital após passar mal na prisão (filho)
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to a hospital on Friday (13) after falling ill in Brasília prison, where he is serving time for an attempted coup. His son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, reported that Jair woke up with chills and vomiting, citing ongoing health problems from a 2018 stabbing.

item.title: Áudio: Proibição de cotas na residência médica será tema de debate em comissão
item.description: The Senate Human Rights Commission will debate Bill 452/2025, proposed by Senator Dr. Hiran (PP-RR), which seeks to ban the use of quotas in medical residency selection processes. Although the bill was removed from the voting agenda at the author’s request, Senator Paulo Paim (PT-RS) secured a formal debate, arguing the proposal contradicts Brazil’s affirmative action principles.

item.title: Itamaraty convocou representante da embaixada dos EUA para tratar de visita de assessor de Trump
item.description: Brazil's foreign ministry summoned the U.S. chargé d'affaires to seek clarification regarding the upcoming visit of Darren Beattie, a senior advisor to Donald Trump. While Beattie's stated purpose is to attend a rare earth minerals forum, sources indicate he intended to meet with jailed former president Jair Bolsonaro and Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, though the Bolsonaro meeting was blocked by Justice Alexandre de Moraes. The U.S. Embassy maintains the trip will proceed to advance the 'America First' foreign policy agenda.

item.title: Comissão aprova suspensão de edital para eleição do Conselho Nacional de Políticas sobre Drogas
item.description: The Public Security Committee of the Chamber of Deputies approved PDL 170/25, suspending Public Call Edict 2/25 of the National Council on Drug Policies (Conad). Rapporteur Deputy Allan Garcês (PP-MA) argued the edict imposes ideological criteria, violates the Federal Pact by using regional tie-breaking rules, lacks transparency, and exceeds the Ministry of Justice’s regulatory authority. The edict aimed to fill 10 civil society seats for the 2025-2027 biennium, emphasizing gender and racial diversity.

item.title: Jair Bolsonaro passa mal na prisão e é levado a hospital em Brasília, diz Flávio
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to a hospital in Brasília after experiencing chills and vomiting while imprisoned at the Papudinha penitentiary complex, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro. The Military Police of the Federal District confirmed the medical transfer but did not disclose details about his health condition or the destination hospital. Bolsonaro is serving a 27-year and three-month sentence for attempted coup d'état, as convicted by the First Chamber of the STF.

item.title: Pesquisa Realtime/Bigdata: Lula tem 35%, Flávio Bolsonaro 31% e Zema 15% dos votos em MG
item.description: A Realtime/Bigdata poll conducted in Minas Gerais shows President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva leading the presidential race with 35% of voting intentions, followed by Flávio Bolsonaro at 31% and Romeu Zema at 15%. The data reflects a tight contest among the main candidates in the state, with Lula maintaining a narrow lead despite Bolsonaro's close proximity.

item.title: Pesquisa Realtime/Bigdata: Lula tem 35%, Flávio Bolsonaro 31% e Zema 15% dos votos em MG
item.description: Pesquisa Realtime/Bigdata: Lula tem 35%, Flávio Bolsonaro 31% e Zema 15% dos votos em MG

item.title: Ex-presidente Bolsonaro é levado para hospital após passar mal na prisão (filho)
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to a hospital after falling ill while in prison, his son reported on Thursday, March 13, 2026. The incident occurred at the correctional facility where he is serving his sentence, and the exact causes of his medical episode have not yet been officially disclosed. Medical staff provided immediate care, and Bolsonaro remains under observation.

item.title: Vídeo: Senado Aprova: uso de IA para proteger vítimas de violência doméstica
item.description: The Senate approved two bills expanding protection for victims of domestic violence: PL 750/2026, which allows the use of artificial intelligence, including an emergency button app to alert police, and PL 715/2019, which guarantees priority access to free reconstructive surgeries and psychological and social care for women in situations of violence, regardless of where the aggression occurred. Both bills now proceed to the Chamber of Deputies for review.

item.title: Bolsonaro está a caminho do hospital, diz Flávio
item.description: Flávio Bolsonaro reported that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, is being taken to DF Star Hospital after waking up with chills and severe vomiting. The former president is incarcerated at the 19th Military Police Battalion in the Federal District (Papudinha) and has a history of health issues stemming from the 2018 stabbing attack, including bilateral hernia surgery in December 2025. Family members are requesting prayers and alleging political persecution.

item.title: Bolsonaro é levado a hospital após passar mal, diz Flávio
item.description: Jair Bolsonaro was taken to DF Star Hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting, according to his son Flávio Bolsonaro. He is currently detained at the 19th Military Police Battalion in DF and has a history of health issues stemming from the 2018 stabbing attack. The family alleges political persecution and calls for prayers for his recovery.

item.title: BBB 26: Cowboy vence a Prova do Líder pela terceira vez; veja como foi e quem está no VIP
item.description: Cowboy won the Leader's Competition in BBB 26 for the third time, defeating Jonas and Jordana in the final round. The challenge involved finding prize-winning phones in trios, with Marciele excluded for not joining any team. This week's VIP includes Jonas, Marciele, Jordana, and Gabriela.

item.title: Caiado defende anistia 'ampla, geral e irrestrita' para condenados do 8 de janeiro para pré-campanha
item.description: Ronaldo Caiado, governor of Goiás and PSD presidential pre-candidate for 2026, advocated in a Globonews interview for a 'broad, general and unrestricted' amnesty for those convicted in the January 8 attacks. He also labeled the PCC and Comando Vermelho as terrorist organizations, criticized President Lula for allegedly acting as an 'embassador of factions', and warned that the 2026 elections will determine whether Brazil moves toward 'Venezuelanization'.

item.title: Bolsonaro vai para o hospital com calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to the hospital on the morning of Friday, March 13, 2026, after experiencing chills and vomiting, according to a post by his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, and confirmed by federal deputy Sóstenes Cavalcante. Bolsonaro is serving a 27-year and three-month sentence at the 19th Military Police Battalion in Brasília (Papudinha) for attempted coup d'état. His defense had previously requested house arrest due to multiple chronic health conditions, but the request was denied by the Supreme Federal Court (STF).

item.title: Bolsonaro é levado para hospital após sofrer calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Former president Jair Bolsonaro is being taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, in a post on X. He is serving a sentence at the Papudinha complex in Brasília for attempted coup d'État, as ruled by the STF.

item.title: Petrobras adere ao programa do governo para baratear o diesel
item.description: Petrobras announced its adherence to the federal program to reduce diesel prices, which includes PIS/Cofins tax exemptions and a 32-cent-per-liter subsidy, conditional on full pass-through to consumers. The measure aims to mitigate the impact of rising oil prices, driven by the U.S.-Iran war, on inflation and freight costs, in an election year marked by the Lula vs. Flávio Bolsonaro race.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro foi encaminhado a hospital após vômitos e calafrios
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) stated he received news that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, was taken back to the hospital after waking up with chills and vomiting. The former president has been imprisoned at Papudinha since November 2024, serving a sentence for leading a coup plot following the 2022 elections. The information remains preliminary, according to the senator, who is a pre-candidate for president.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro foi encaminhado a hospital após vômitos e calafrios
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro reported that former President Jair Bolsonaro, currently imprisoned in Papudinha, was returned to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting early Friday morning. The update, shared by Flávio around 08:14, raised concerns about the ex-president's health condition.

item.title: Como descobrir quem está usando seu Wi-Fi pelo celular e identificar aparelhos desconhecidos na rede
item.description: Suspicions of unauthorized Wi-Fi use may arise due to slow or unstable internet, even with few connected devices. Mobile apps allow users to check which devices are connected to the network and identify unknown ones, helping detect intrusions or unauthorized password sharing.

item.title: Decisão judicial alemã restringe acesso a mensagem de celular de investigados
item.description: Germany's Federal Court of Justice restricted investigators' access to mobile phone messages of suspects, setting limits on using such communications as evidence in criminal proceedings. The ruling aims to protect privacy rights amid growing reliance on digital data in investigations.

item.title: Flávio diz que Jair Bolsonaro foi levado ao hospital, após passar mal na prisão
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro reported that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, was taken to a hospital in Brasília after falling ill at the Papuda Penitentiary Complex, exhibiting vomiting and chills. He asked for prayers for his father's health, expressing hope that it is not serious.

item.title: Bolsonaro passa mal e volta a precisar de atendimento médico, diz Flávio
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro fell ill on Friday (13) and required medical attention, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro. He reportedly woke up with chills and vomited heavily, based on preliminary information. Bolsonaro is currently incarcerated at the Papudinha facility in Brasília, serving a 27-year and three-month sentence for attempted coup d'état.

item.title: Trump diz acreditar que novo líder supremo do Irã está “debilitado”
item.description: Donald Trump said he believes Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei — chosen after his father Ali Khamenei was killed in the U.S.-Israel war against Iran — is alive but debilitated, following injuries sustained on February 28 and no public appearances since. His first comments were read by a state TV presenter on March 12, while government sources and family confirmed his condition, including leg injuries and concealment for security reasons. Trump also reiterated his view that a war with Iran would be an 'easy victory' for the United States.

item.title: Bolsonaro é internado após apresentar calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Senator Flávio Bolsonaro (PL-RJ) stated that former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting episodes on Friday morning, the 13th. The announcement was made via his X account without further health details.

item.title: Flávio diz que Bolsonaro segue para hospital após sofrer calafrios e vômitos
item.description: Flávio Bolsonaro announced that his father, former President Jair Bolsonaro, is being taken to the hospital after experiencing chills and vomiting. The statement was made via a post on X (formerly Twitter) on Friday, March 13.

item.title: Junior Mano pediu a ministro de Lula que atuasse na Anac para liberar avião de Wesley Safadão
item.description: Federal Deputy Junior Mano, under investigation for leading a major corruption scheme in Ceará, requested Minister of Ports and Airports Silvio Costa Filho to authorize the release of two aircraft owned by singer Wesley Safadão through Anac for use in 2024 electoral campaigns. PF-obtained messages show the deputy used his privileged access to the Lula government to bypass state bureaucracy, aiming to use the plane for campaign travel by allied mayors, though no evidence confirms the minister acted on the request.

item.title: Junior Mano pediu a ministro de Lula que atuasse na Anac para liberar avião de Safadão
item.description: Deputy Junior Mano, under investigation for leading a corruption scheme in Ceará, requested Minister of Ports and Airports Silvio Costa Filho to release Wesley Safadão’s aircraft through Anac for use in 2024 electoral campaigns. Federal Police messages reveal he sought to bypass state bureaucracy to benefit criminal allies, using the singer’s plane for travel during elections.

item.title: Bolsonaro vai para hospital com calafrios e vômitos, diz Flávio
item.description: Former President Jair Bolsonaro was taken to the hospital on Thursday morning (March 13, 2026) after experiencing chills and vomiting, according to his son, Senator Flávio Bolsonaro, in a post on X. Flávio asked for prayers for his father's health but did not disclose further details about his condition or the hospital he was taken to. UOL is attempting to obtain official information from Seape, which oversees the Papudinha facility where Bolsonaro is under a precautionary measure.

item.title: Sua relação tem sinais de violência? Faça teste para saber se está num relacionamento abusivo
item.description: Brazil recorded 1,568 femicide cases in 2025, with 8 in 10 committed by current or former partners. The article explains that domestic violence often starts subtly, with signs such as excessive jealousy, emotional blackmail, and isolation, and can escalate to femicide. Experts emphasize that many women fail to recognize abusive relationships for years, as violence builds gradually, disguised as care and love.

item.title: Trump diz acreditar que novo líder supremo do Irã está vivo mas ferido
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said he believes Iran's new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is alive but wounded and possibly impaired. Khamenei has not been seen publicly since his appointment by a clerical assembly, and his first comments were read by a TV presenter. Trump made the remarks in a Fox News interview as the U.S.-Israel-Iran war entered its second week.

item.title: Governo Tarcísio diz que, com tabela SUS paulista, cirurgias de mama cresceram 30% em 2025
item.description: The government of Tarcísio de Freitas claims that the creation of the São Paulo SUS Table in 2023 led to a 30% increase in breast surgeries in the state in 2025, rising from 2,881 in 2022 to 3,759 in 2025. The program corrected federal payment shortfalls and increased procedure reimbursements, with R$9 million transferred to philanthropic hospitals and Santas Casas, which handle half of SUS services in the state. The São Paulo State Health Secretariat also reported an 85.7% rise in elective surgeries during the same period, totaling 1.3 million procedures in 2025.

item.title: Governo Tarcísio diz que, com tabela SUS paulista, cirurgias de mama cresceram 30% em 2025
item.description: Governor Tarcísio de Freitas claims the Paulista SUS Table, launched in 2023, led to a 30% increase in breast surgeries in São Paulo in 2025, with 3,759 procedures performed compared to 2,881 in 2022. The government attributes the rise to correcting federal payment shortfalls and increasing reimbursement rates for hospital and outpatient procedures, citing R$9 million in investments to philanthropic hospitals and Santa Casas, which handle half of the state’s SUS services.

item.title: A disputa pelo governo do Espírito Santo, segundo o Paraná Pesquisas
item.description: A disputa pelo governo do Espírito Santo, segundo o Paraná Pesquisas

item.title: O “ouro” que você joga fora está custando em média R$ 77 o kg
item.description: Pumpkin seeds, often thrown away, are a highly nutritious food costing an average of R$77 per kilogram in Brazil in 2025. Rich in protein, zinc, magnesium, omega-3 and other minerals, they support prostate health, sleep, blood sugar control, immunity and cardiovascular function, offering a natural alternative to expensive industrial supplements.

item.title: Horóscopo semanal: previsões dos signos de 16 a 22 de março de 2026
item.description: The weekly horoscope for March 16–22, 2026 indicates the closing of cycles with the Sun in Pisces conjunct Saturn and Neptune, followed by the Sun's entry into Aries on March 20, marking the Astrological New Year and a favorable period for new beginnings requiring discipline and planning. Mercury turns direct on March 19, deepening communication but increasing the risk of misunderstandings, while Venus in Aries square Jupiter warns against impulsive spending and urges balancing desire with reality. Mars in Pisces conjunct Mercury suggests impulsive actions driven by the unconscious, requiring caution to align actions with inner truth rather than momentary impulses.
